DISCOVERY, 302, AS TO DEFENDANT LENORE LEVINSON'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS' RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS, DEFENDANT LEVINSON'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SUPPLEMENTAL REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION AND SUPPLEMENTAL INTERROGATORIES IS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE REPRESENTATION THAT THE RESPONSES SOUGHT HAVE BEEN PROVIDED; MONETARY SANCTIONS OF $500.00 (2 HRS. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND $60.00 FILING FEE PER PARA. 12 OF MR. GILLE'S DECLARATION) FOR PLAINTIFFS' FAILURE TO OBTAIN A FURTHER EXTENSION OF TIME FOR THE RESPONSES WHILE IN ITALY AND OUT OF CONTACT WITH COUNSEL ARE DENIED DUE TO LACK OF PROPER NOTICE IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE PRO TEM: DENNIS HYDE, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-05-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Continued To Feb-08-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Mtc Plfs Responses To Discovery And Req For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT LENORE LEVINSON'S Motion to Compel Plaintiffs' Responses To Discovery And Request For Sanctions, defendant Levinson's motion to compel responses to supplemental requests for production and supplemental interrogatories is moot in light of the representation that the responses sought have been provided; monetary sanctions of $500.00 (2 hrs. attorney's fees and $60.00 filing fee per para. 12 of Mr. Gille's declaration) for Plaintiffs' failure to obtain a further extension of time for the responses while in Italy and out of contact with counsel are denied due to lack of proper notice in the notice of motion. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-02-2015 Continued To Sep-21-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Set For Trial On Jun-08-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
